name: python3-webob
title: python3-webob
summary: Python module providing WSGI request and response objects (Python 3)
description:
Python module providing WSGI request and response objects (Python 3)
WebOb provides wrappers around the WSGI request environment, and an object to
help create WSGI responses.
.
The objects map much of the specified behavior of HTTP, including header
parsing and accessors for other standard parts of the environment.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-webob because Python module providing WSGI request and response objects (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-webob as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-webob with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-webob --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
